name: jupiter
description: Compute the best path when multiple choices compete. Designed for routing logic across vendors, investments, execution options, and strategic decisions.
author: qclawbot

capabilities.route_comparison: Compare multiple options using explicit routing logic
capabilities.best_path_selection: Identify the strongest route under real constraints
capabilities.tradeoff_analysis: Expose hidden weaknesses and structural tradeoffs
capabilities.decision_ranking: Rank alternatives by objective-fit and route quality

audience: Operators choosing between vendors or suppliers
Decision-makers needing best-path logic under constraints
